text: **Doc updates needed:** README.md:90 + 118 (replace `@<codename>` targeting vocabulary with `@<agent-label>`), daemon-rpc-surface.md:23–27 (drop the `codename` field from the example + delete the explainer paragraph, matching the §2 hook change), tail-v2-design.md:48–49 (delete/replace the codename definition).
